event: Da Vinci-assisted laparoscopic one-stage single-anastomosis DS procedure
window created for transection of the duodenum
anastomosis tested with methylene blue and air
drain placed in left upper quadrant
upper gastrointestinal study on postoperative day 2
free fluid suggestive of leak or bleeding
no leakage seen with methylene blue test
transfused with 2 units of packed red blood cells
increased sanguinous output from abdominal drain
taken back to operating room for exploratory laparotomy
received 5 units of PRBCs and 4 units of fresh frozen plasma
post-operative course complicated by hemorrhagic fluid collections
acute thrombosis of left internal jugular and subclavian veins
